titleStmt.title: SII 41.265: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 265. (A.R. No. 482 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the south wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Gift of a sum of 40 kāsu for a lamp to the shrine of Tiruvarangil-Aṇḍamuṟa-nimirandaruḷina-Nāyanār at Tiruvālangāḍu in Tiruppaḻaiyanūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam. The donor was Aṟanilaivisāgan Tirailōkyamallan Vatsarājan of Arumbākkam in [I]llattūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Kunṟavattana-kōṭṭam, who is said to have renderd the Bhārata into elegant Tamil and found out the path of Śiva (i.e., the Śaiva creed). Two maṉṟāḍis received the money for maintaining the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi virāapiṣekamum vicaiyāapiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya tribhuvana viradevaṟkuyāṇṭu 3 10 2vatu jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu kuṉṟavattanak koṭṭattu pāratantaṉṉaiaruntamuḻpaṭuttic civaṉeṟikaṇṭa Aṟanilaivicākaṉ trailokyamallaṉ vatsarājaṉimmaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟ koṭṭattut tiruppaḻaiya
ṉūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭu Uṭaiyaṉāyaṉār tiruvaraṅkil Aṇṭamuṟanimirntaruḷina ṉāyaṉārkku vaitta tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku maṉṟāṭi cūṟṟiyappaṉ viḷakku Araiyum Uyyavantāṉ
caṭṭakkoṉ viḷakku Araiyum Āka viḷakku Onṟukkuppacu muppattiraṇṭukkum ṛṣabham Oṉṟukkum nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu nāṟpatu Ippaḻaṅkācu ṉāṟpatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku Arumo
ḻitevaṉāl Uḻakkuney cantirātittavaraiy celuttakkaṭavomāka kuṉṟavattaṉak koṭṭattu Illattūr nāṭṭu Arumpākkattu pārataṉ tannaiyaruntamiḻppaṭuttic civa
neṟikaṇṭa Aṟanilaivicākaṉ trailokkiyamal[ laṉ vatsarājaṉ] kaikkoṇṭom Ivviruvom
Digital edition of SII 41.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
